node.text: John organized a 5K charity run in the neighborhood to help veterans and their families.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "causes events for") on Observation 1 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: John participated in a marching event for veterans' rights.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "causes events for") on Observation 2 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: John believes it's important to come together for important causes like supporting victims of domestic abuse.

node.text: John faced challenges in getting sponsors for the charity run but was successful in the end.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "causes events for") on Observation 2 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: John and his team raised donations like canned food, toiletries, and clothes for the cause.

node.text: John is currently working on a project to support military veterans and is trying to get a petition going.

node.text: John is very passionate about making sure veterans are supported and valued in the community.
